meta.title: Calculate Pot Odds
meta.description: Compute the odds the pot is offering you.

blocks.content:
## Calculate Pot Odds

Time to drill the pot odds formula. Remember: **pot odds = call amount / (total pot including your call)**. Work through each one and let the formula become automatic!

blocks.title: Calculate Pot Odds
blocks.instructions: For each problem, calculate the pot odds as a percentage. Pot odds = call amount / (pot + opponent bet + your call).
